text.title: Java Spring Boot Enterprise Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Domain entity count ≥ 5 with externally-exposed PKs?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — use plain java-spring-boot; the BaseEntity inheritance overhead is unjustified

branch.question: Does every entity inherit BaseEntity (UUID + audit + @Version)?

conclusion.verdict: introduce BaseEntity before scaffolding additional entities
set class-level read-only default; write methods override
apply remaining rules — record DTOs + MapStruct + ProblemDetail + Actuator + Micrometer + Security

text.example: enterprise_grade=true → dynamic_search=true → jpaspecificationexecutor-for-search → wire Specification factories per filter primitive + Pageable.
